ValidationRule.description: Prevent duplicate Case Assignment Name values.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Name)), NOT(ISBLANK(VLOOKUP( $ObjectType.FEC_Case_Assignment__c.Fields.Id, $ObjectType.FEC_Case_Assignment__c.Fields.Name, Name ))), VLOOKUP( $ObjectType.FEC_Case_Assignment__c.Fields.Id, $ObjectType.FEC_Case_Assignment__c.Fields.Name, Name ) <> Id )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Case Assignment Name đã tồn tại.
